positive.prompt: Expand this approved idea document into an implementation-ready specification
Turn docs/ideas/usage-billing.md into a spec and define proof of completion
We have clarified the feature idea; now define requirements and success criteria before planning

negative.prompt: Help me clarify and save this rough product idea
Turn this approved specification into an ordered task list

evals.prompt: Use the approved idea for usage-based billing to produce the specification before any planning or implementation. The idea explains the goal but does not say how completion should be proven.
evals.expected_output: An implementation-ready specification workflow that proposes concrete completion evidence, obtains user confirmation, and keeps testing strategy distinct from success criteria.
expectations: Material repository context is inspected rather than commands or conventions being invented
The agent proposes a small number of outcome-based verification candidates and asks what evidence is sufficient
Success criteria contain an observable outcome, proof method, and explicit pass condition
The testing strategy is concise and covers mandatory checks, critical observable behaviors, a task-relevant fast loop, and broader gates
Acceptance criteria, success criteria, and testing strategy remain distinct
No plan, task breakdown, or implementation code is produced
